headline: Fifth Third Shifts To NYSE As Capital Structure And Valuation Draw Focus
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is shifting its stock listing from Nasdaq to the New York Stock Exchange. All publicly traded securities of the company are scheduled to move exchanges in mid June. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:FITB, this listing transfer comes with the stock recently closing at $48.56. Over the past year, the share price is up 32.1%, and over the past three years the stock has gained 114.5%. Over five years, the stock return is 39.4%, offering a longer look at how the market has...
